description_long: This advertising board features a rectangular, horizontally-oriented display panel supported by two sturdy vertical legs. The front face is dominated by a bold red background with a high-contrast graphic of a smiling man in glasses and the white text 'UFC' beside him, suggesting a static printed advertisement. The legs are simple, straight, and appear to be made of metal, providing stability for outdoor placement. The side views reveal the panel's moderate thickness and the absence of any visible illumination or decorative frame elements. The back of the board is plain, lacking any additional graphics or features. The overall design is utilitarian, focusing on visibility and durability for urban environments.
description: A rectangular advertising board with a red printed front graphic, supported by two metal legs, designed for outdoor urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the red advertising panel with a graphic and 'UFC' text, supported by two metal legs.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the thin profile of the rectangular panel and the alignment of the supporting legs.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, but without any visible graphics or text, just the plain panel and legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and the two supporting legs.
attribute_mounting_type: freestanding, supported by two vertical metal legs
attribute_frame_design: frameless rectangular panel with simple metal leg supports
attribute_advertisement_content: static printed advertisement with a graphic of a man and 'UFC' text on a red background
